176157.name: Share of global annual CO2 emissions from gas
176157.description: Annual production-based emissions of carbon dioxide (CO2) from gas, measured as a percentage of global production-based emissions of CO2 from gas in the same year. This is based on territorial emissions, which do not account for emissions embedded in traded goods. Each country's share of global CO2 emissions from gas has been calculated by Our World in Data using global CO2 emissions from gas provided in the Global Carbon Budget dataset. Global gas emissions include all country emissions as well as emissions from international aviation and shipping.

display.name: Share of global annual CO₂ emissions from gas

176157.datasetName: Global Carbon Budget - Global Carbon Project (2020)
176157.s_name: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project

source.name: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project
source.dataPublishedBy: Our World in Data based on the Global Carbon Project
source.additionalInfo:
The Global Carbon Budget dataset is available at https://folk.universitetetioslo.no/roberan/GCB2020.shtml (1750-2019) and https://doi.org/10.18160/GCP-2020 (1959-2019).

Full reference for the Global Carbon Budget - Global Carbon Project (2020) dataset: Friedlingstein et al, Global Carbon Budget 2020, Earth Syst. Sci. Data, 12, 3269–3340, https://doi.org/10.5194/essd-12-3269-2020, 2020.

Our World in Data have renamed the category "bunker fuels" as "International transport" for improved clarity, which includes emissions from international aviation and shipping.
